name: Custom Workspace Canvas
description: Default composition shipped by growthub-custom-workspace-starter-v1. Demonstrates the SDK widget grid (`@growthub/api-contract/widgets`) on the canonical Custom Workspace primitive: chat session + workflow runner + artifact viewer wired to the kit's session-memory and trace.jsonl primitives. Forks edit ids, layouts, and bindings to tailor the canvas to the workspace's real domain.

provenance.note: Shipped with growthub-custom-workspace-starter-v1; safe to edit. Run `growthub compose preview` to validate after edits.
